data.title: Iranian Parliament Speaker: All 7 of Trump's social media statements are "untrue"
data.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Ghalibaf posted on social media early on the 18th that seven statements made by US President Donald Trump within an hour on social media platforms were "all untrue." He stated that the US failed to win the war with lies and is destined to gain nothing in negotiations. Ghalibaf emphasized that if the US continues its blockade of Iranian ports, the Strait of Hormuz will remain closed. (Xinhua)

data.title: Trump: First batch of UFO documents will be released soon
data.description: US President Trump stated at a rally on the 17th that his administration has found many "very interesting" documents regarding unidentified flying objects (UFOs), and the first batch of documents will be released soon. (Jinshi)

data.title: Cursor plans to raise $2 billion, valuing the company at $50 billion.
data.description: AI programming tool company Cursor is close to completing a new round of financing, aiming to raise at least $2 billion, bringing its pre-money valuation to $50 billion. This round is expected to be led by Thrive Capital and Andreessen Horowitz, with participation from strategic investors including Nvidia, and Battery Ventures potentially joining as a new investor. If successfully completed, the company's valuation will significantly increase from approximately $29.3 billion six months ago. In terms of revenue, Cursor's annualized revenue was approximately $2 billion in February of this year, and it projects it will exceed $6 billion by the end of 2026. Meanwhile, through self-developed models and optimized cost structure, the company has achieved positive gross profit margins in some business segments. (TechCrunch)

data.title: Iranian Speaker Challenges U.S. President Trump's Social Media Claims
data.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf stated on social media that U.S. President Donald Trump's seven declarations made within an hour on social media were "untrue." According to Odaily, Ghalibaf criticized the U.S. for relying on falsehoods, asserting that this approach has not led to success in war and will not yield results in negotiations. He further warned that if the U.S. continues to block Iranian ports, the Strait of Hormuz will not remain open.

data.title: Account with over $1 million in profit and a total purchase of $300,000; Hornets defeat Magic in NBA play-in tournament.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, an account with over $1 million in profits (address: 0x5d58e38cd0a7e6f5fa67b7f9c2f70dd70df09a15) placed $300,000 bets on the Hornets defeating the Magic in the Polymarket "NBA Play-In Game Hornets vs. Magic" prediction event, with an average opening price of 58¢. The NBA Play-In Game Hornets vs. Magic begins at 7:30 AM Beijing time today. The winner of this game will face the Pistons as the 8th seed in the Eastern Conference. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: High-Stakes Bet on Hornets vs. Magic NBA Play-In Game
data.description:
A significant wager has been placed on the outcome of the NBA play-in game between the Charlotte Hornets and the Orlando Magic. According to Odaily, an account with profits exceeding $1 million has invested $300,000 on the Hornets to defeat the Magic, with an average opening price of 58 cents.

The game is scheduled to begin at 7:30 AM UTC+8, with the winner advancing as the eighth seed in the Eastern Conference to face the Detroit Pistons.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 77,000 USDT with a Narrowed 2.68% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 17, 2026, 23:20 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 77,000 USDT and is now trading at 76,986.5625 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.68% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: U.S. Approves $11.9 Billion Combat Systems Sale to Germany
data.description: The U.S. government has approved a potential sale of combat management systems to Germany, valued at up to $11.9 billion. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the State Department's announcement regarding the deal. This sale involves advanced systems designed for surface vessels, enhancing Germany's naval capabilities. The approval marks a significant step in U.S.-Germany defense relations, reflecting ongoing cooperation between the two nations in military technology and strategic defense initiatives.

data.title: Russia Proposes Bill to Criminalize Unregistered Crypto Services
data.description: Russia has introduced a draft bill aimed at criminalizing unregistered cryptocurrency services, proposing penalties of up to seven years in prison for violations by organized groups. According to NS3.AI, the legislation would mandate that entities involved in digital currency circulation obtain a license from the Bank of Russia. Individuals found in violation could face fines of up to $4,000. However, Russia's Supreme Court has indicated that implementing criminal penalties may be premature until the Digital Currency and Digital Rights law is anticipated to come into effect in July.

data.title: California Judge Rules JENNER Memecoin Not a Security in Class Action Case
data.description: A California judge has determined that Caitlyn Jenner's JENNER memecoin does not qualify as a security in a class action lawsuit filed by Lee Greenfield. According to NS3.AI, Greenfield claimed to have lost over $40,000 and argued that the memecoin constituted a security under the Howey test. However, U.S. District Judge Stanley Blumenfeld Jr. concluded that Greenfield failed to plausibly demonstrate a common enterprise, a key component of the Howey test. The judge noted that any remaining non-federal claims could be addressed in state court.

data.title: Rhea Finance Attack Recap: Losses Expand to $18.4 Million, Some Funds Recovered
data.description: Rhea Finance released a post-attack report confirming that the vulnerability resulted in an actual loss of approximately $18.4 million, a significant increase from the initial estimate of approximately $7.6 million. The attackers manipulated liquidity using a fake token pool by constructing complex transaction paths. They channeled borrowed assets into a pool under their control while returning only a small amount, rapidly reducing a large number of margin positions to undercollateralized and triggering liquidation, ultimately depleting the protocol's reserves. Currently, approximately $11.2 million has been recovered or frozen, including some USDC and NEAR assets returned by the attackers, and approximately $4.34 million in USDT frozen (with the assistance of Tether).

data.title: Iranian Parliament Speaker: We will never relinquish control of the Strait of Hormuz; Trump's boastful claim of destroying Iranian civilization has failed.
data.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Ghalibaf stated on social media on the 17th that the US has accepted the fact that Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz. Iran will never relinquish its jurisdiction over the Strait of Hormuz. Ghalibaf said that US President Trump's "extreme eagerness" to reach an agreement with Iran precisely demonstrates that his plan to destroy Iranian civilization has failed. Ghalibaf added that the US has not yet taken any military action in its maritime blockade of Iran, and Iran will not tolerate this.

data.title: Strategy plans to change STRC preferred stock dividends to once every two weeks.
data.description: Strategy has proposed adjusting the dividend mechanism for its STRC preferred stock, planning to change the current monthly dividend payment to twice-monthly (once every two weeks), subject to shareholder approval. STRC is a perpetual preferred stock aimed at trading around its $100 par value, with a floating dividend mechanism to adjust its price; currently, the annualized dividend is approximately 11.5%. The company states that increasing the dividend frequency will help reduce reinvestment lag, improve market liquidity, and enhance price stability. STRC is one of a series of preferred stock financing instruments at Strategy, forming part of its capital structure along with STRF, STRE, STRK, and STRD products. These instruments have helped the company raise significant funds for its continued Bitcoin accumulation.

data.title: World has released a major upgrade to World ID, integrating with multiple scenarios including Tinder and Zoom.
data.description: World has launched its largest upgrade to the World ID protocol to date, covering approximately 18 million Orb-verified users and expanding to multiple application scenarios including social networking, conferencing, and ticketing. This upgrade introduces several features, including multi-key support, key rotation, account recovery, and session management. It also launches a standalone World ID app as an entry point for user authentication and authorization management. At the application level, Tinder has integrated a "real person authentication badge" to identify genuine users; Zoom has launched the "Deep Face" feature to identify AI-generated content in video calls; and it has also launched the ticketing tool Concert Kit. Furthermore, platforms such as Reddit, Razer, and Mythical Games are exploring or integrating the system. World proposes the concept of "human continuity," emphasizing not only verifying user identity but also ensuring the consistency of the same genuine individual across different scenarios. Industry insiders believe this direction may become a crucial infrastructure for combating AI-generated content.

data.title: Wrapped XRP is listed on Solana, expanding DeFi use cases.
data.description: The cross-chain version of XRP, wXRP, has been launched on Solana, allowing holders to participate in the DeFi ecosystem without selling their assets. wXRP is custodied by Hex Trust and cross-chain via LayerZero, pegged 1:1 to native XRP, and can be exchanged at any time. This asset is already integrated into multiple Solana applications, including Titan, Jupiter, Meteora, and Phantom wallets, supporting functions such as trading, liquidity provision, and yield earning. This move signifies that XRP, originally geared towards payment scenarios, is further integrating into the DeFi system, expanding its application space in cross-chain and on-chain finance.

data.title: The Crypto Innovation Council acquires an energy policy body to strengthen its position on computing power and energy issues.
data.description: Crypto Council for Innovation (CCI) has announced its acquisition of Digital Energy Council (DEC), marking its first expansion into the energy policy arena. CCI is a global industry advocacy organization with members including numerous crypto and fintech companies, primarily promoting digital asset regulation, technological innovation, and policy communication, and working to bridge the gap between government and industry. Previously, the organization played a significant role in US policy lobbying. DEC focuses on energy issues related to the digital economy, particularly the impact of crypto mining, data centers, and high-performance computing (HPC) on the power system, with a core focus on energy supply, grid stability, and national security. Following this integration, the energy sector will prioritize policy initiatives including energy development, grid resilience, US competitiveness, and critical infrastructure security.

data.title: Silver Point and SVP Acquire Significant QVC Bank Debt Amid Restructuring
data.description: Silver Point and SVP have recently acquired a substantial amount of QVC bank debt, according to a company lawyer. Bloomberg posted on X, indicating that the firms are positioned to own sizeable stakes in the television shopping network as it undergoes restructuring under Chapter 11. This acquisition marks a significant move in the financial landscape of QVC, potentially impacting its future operations and ownership structure.

data.title: Rhea Finance Exploit Results in $18.4 Million Loss
data.description: Rhea Finance reported a security breach on Thursday, resulting in a loss of approximately $18.4 million from its lending protocol. According to NS3.AI, this figure is a significant increase from the initial estimate of $7.6 million. A post-mortem analysis on Friday revealed that the attacker exploited the protocol's margin trading feature through a strategically constructed swap route. Rhea Finance has managed to recover or freeze some of the stolen funds, including about 4.34 million USDT that was frozen.

data.title: Strategy Proposes Semi-Monthly Dividend Schedule to Enhance Stability
data.description: Strategy has submitted a proxy proposal to transition its STRC preferred dividends to a semi-monthly payment schedule, maintaining the annual dividend rate at 11.5%. According to NS3.AI, Michael Saylor, the company's representative, stated that this adjustment aims to stabilize the stock price, reduce cyclicality, and enhance liquidity and demand. The voting on this proposal is set to conclude on June 8, with the first payment under the new plan anticipated on July 15.

data.title: Hex Trust Launches Wrapped XRP on Solana, Expanding DeFi Access
data.description: Hex Trust has introduced a 1:1 backed wrapped XRP on the Solana network, enabling users and institutions to access XRP within Solana's decentralized finance (DeFi) ecosystem. According to NS3.AI, over 834,000 XRP, valued at approximately $1.2 million, has already been minted on the network. This launch extends the utility of XRP beyond its native XRP Ledger, utilizing a custody-and-mint model to facilitate broader integration into Solana's DeFi space.
